title: BudgetTracker multi-account manager
description: Implement a BudgetTracker that manages a collection of BudgetAccounts and provides summary reporting.
requirements: addAccount(BudgetAccount account) adds an account; throws IllegalArgumentException if account is null or if an account with the same name already exists
getAccount(String name) returns the BudgetAccount with that name, or throws IllegalArgumentException if not found
getAccounts() returns an unmodifiable list of all accounts
getTotalBalance() returns the sum of getBalance() across all accounts
getSummary() returns a multi-line String listing each account name and balance, plus a total line
context: Package is com.teamtom, Java 21. Depends on BudgetAccount (task-003) and Transaction (task-002).
